full_description: FocusFlow is a productivity app that helps users stay focused and avoid distractions. It uses the Pomodoro Technique, which involves working in focused, 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. This technique can help you stay on track and maintain a sustainable work pace. With FocusFlow, you can customize your work sessions to fit your needs, setting the length of your work periods and breaks to suit your style. The app also provides features to help you avoid distractions, such as website blockers and notification reminders. Whether you're working on a complex project or studying for an exam, FocusFlow can help you stay focused and achieve your goals.
